channel.title: Ric 24 on Ric - An unknown artist
channel.description: Recent content in Ric 24 on Ric - An unknown artist

item.title: Albergo - Ric24
item.description: Short description: An alley in front of a harbour Notes: Taken from eBay . The title of the listing suggests Milan , Italy. Image by Mark Strong of Meibohm Fine Arts . The description on eBay is very interesting, there is a post about it. Other entries for this work

item.title: Ric 24
item.description: Short description: An alley in front of a harbour Notes: Three images found on eBay Other entries for this work
